arn.description: Amazon Resource Name used for identifying the subnet in AWS operations

assign_ipv6_address_on_creation.description: Indicates if IPv6 addresses are automatically assigned to instances in the subnet

availability_zone_id.description: ID of the availability zone of the subnet

available_ip_address_count.description: Number of unused IP addresses available in the subnet

customer_owned_ipv4_pool.description: Associated customer-owned IPv4 address pool for the subnet

default_for_az.description: Indicates if the subnet is the default subnet for the availability zone

enable_dns64.description: Specifies if DNS64 is enabled for the subnet to support IPv6-only workloads

enable_lni_at_device_index.description: Index of the network interface card enabled for local network interfaces

enable_resource_name_dns_a_record_on_lau.description: Indicates if DNS A records are created for resources launched in the subnet

enable_resource_name_dns_aaaa_record_on_.description: Indicates if DNS AAAA records are created for resources launched in the subnet

id.description: Unique identifier for the subnet used in configuration and resource referencing

ipv6_cidr_block.description: IPv6 CIDR block of the subnet

ipv6_cidr_block_association_id.description: Identifier for the association of an IPv6 CIDR block with the subnet

ipv6_native.description: Indicates if the subnet supports native IPv6 addressing

map_customer_owned_ip_on_launch.description: Specifies if customer-owned IPs are assigned to instances launched in the subnet

map_public_ip_on_launch.description: Indicates if public IPs are automatically assigned to instances on launch

outpost_arn.description: Amazon Resource Name of the Outpost associated with the subnet, if any

owner_id.description: AWS account ID of the owner of the subnet

private_dns_hostname_type_on_launch.description: Specifies the type of private DNS hostname assigned to instances on launch

tags.description: Map of tags assigned to the subnet

vpc_id.description: ID of the VPC the subnet belongs to
